name: Apple-Apricot Strudels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a bowl, mix apples, apricots, almonds, granulated sugar, bread crumbs, lemon juice, and nutmeg.
3. Fold one phyllo leaf in half crosswise and brush with melted butter (keep remaining phyllo leaves covered with a dampened towel to prevent drying).
4. Place about 2/3 cup of the apple mixture in the center of the phyllo leaf, 1 inch from the narrow end.
5. Fold the sides of the phyllo toward the center, slightly overlapping them.
6. Roll up the phyllo starting at the filling end; place seam side down on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 with the remaining phyllo leaves and apple mixture.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until golden brown; cool.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Serve with soft custard if desired.
